name: campus-notification-system-root
description: Root orchestrator for Campus Notification System services

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix logging_middleware && npm install --prefix notification_app_be && npm install --prefix notification_app_fe
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "logging,backend,frontend" -c "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run dev:log" "npm run dev:be" "npm run dev:fe"
